title: General purpose double sides/sided clear sticky tape 50mm x 33m for office/craft
features: One of the of using double sided tape is the difficulty of peeling back the liner.
This superb product has a wider liner than the double sided ﬁlm.
The result is that you can quickly and easily peel away the liner.
description: Ultratape Double Sided Tape High quality multi-purpose double sided tapes. General purpose double sided tape is a clear tape for joining and attaching most materials at home and around the office with the quick and easy peel away liner. Easy lift tape features wider backing liner for easy removal. The easy to use dispenser features a double sided tape with no liner to remove. PRODUCT FEATURES: ★ Ideal for photo albums and wrapping ★ For home, office and school use ★ Quick and easy peel away liner
